visual_description: A medium close-up shot focuses on two men sitting side-by-side at a desk in a dimly lit office. Both men are wearing light-colored, collared shirts. The man on the right is in sharp focus, looking down intently at a laptop in front of him. He has a headset on and appears to be speaking into a microphone positioned near his mouth. The man on the left is slightly out of focus, also wearing a headset and looking down at his own equipment. The background is dark, with a window covered by blinds visible behind them. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is present in the upper left corner of the frame. The camera is steady. The audio opens with the distinct, rapid clicking of a computer keyboard, creating a sense of urgency and focused work. A man speaks in a clear, direct voice, calling out with a sense of urgency, "Huo Jiguan." The camera pans to the right, revealing a third man sitting at a desk further down the row. He is also wearing a headset and looking at a laptop. The shot is slightly shaky as it moves across the office space. The "风行网" watermark remains visible. The man continues, "Huo Jiguan, which channel?"
